# technitium_dns_zone (Resource)

Manages an authoritative DNS zone on a Technitium DNS Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "technitium_dns_zone" "example" {
  name = "example.com"
  type = "Primary"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The domain name of the zone.
- `type` (String) The type of zone. Valid values: Primary, Secondary, Stub, Forwarder, SecondaryForwarder, Catalog.

### Optional

- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the zone is disabled.

### Read-Only

- `dnssec_status` (String) The DNSSEC status of the zone.
